channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: White line disappearing. Needs repainting, 2nd March
item.description:
The white line which I had painted in the road across my drive has faded badly and disappeared in places so cars park on it, often blocking my drive. Please can you repaint it?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Wickham Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 143/145 Victoria Road, 2nd March
item.description:
Kerb stone displaced by tree is huge trip hazard and prevents parking space being used as cannot open car fires without damage to car door (which cannot be seen by driver when parking)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Previously reported - enquiry reference is 8861566., 2nd March
item.description:
Your report says you are still looking into this but now we've had a couple of days of dry weather the water has disappeared. Buit there is still mud in the road by the kerb and a bump in the tarmac outside my main driveway entrance which leads to my front door.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Wickham Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box junction marks need repainting, 2nd March
item.description:
The yellow box junction markings are almost non existence. They need repainting.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windmill Hill, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 2nd March
item.description:
Left on pavement leaning against fence - pls remove.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crystal Palace Park Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped tyre, 2nd March
item.description:
On pavement, please remove.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crystal Palace Park Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signs require maintenance, 2nd March
item.description:
The traffic enforcement cameras sign is hanging off its mount and the Shopping Centre Parking sign is bent and damaged and needs replacing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Empire Square, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plasterboard left tipped for nunber of days, 2nd March
item.description:
Full shewt of plasterboard left over a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mortlock Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken light, 2nd March
item.description:
The final light is out on the footpath behind Leconsfield House, walking towards Dog Kennel Hill open space

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Monclar Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing concrete slab on steps, 2nd March
item.description:
A concrete slab is missing at the steps leading down from Leconsfield House towards Dog Kennel Hill Park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Estate Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 104-106 Salusbury by bus stop, 2nd March
item.description:
Stump has been abandoned for a long time and not removed or replaced. Please can both things be done

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned green bins x2, 2nd March
item.description:
Abandoned green bins next to Southwark refuse bin. Posted under ref 8952368 and marked complete but bins still here. They do not relate to a household.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sunray Avenue, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No street lighting on Cheriton. Ave, 2nd March
item.description:
Lighting out for the whole street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheriton Avenue, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement covered in glass, 2nd March
item.description:
Pavement covered in glass since before Christmas from presumably a break in to a car window. Needs sweeping up and removing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 228, Bromley Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street weeds outside 60-62b Maberley Road, 2nd March
item.description:
These weeds have been here for a few months, could they be tidied up, please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Maberley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose kerb stone of Anerley Road, near junction of Anerley Vale, 10m south of bus stop, 2nd March
item.description:
Kerb of Anerley Road, near junction of Anerley Vale, 10m south of bus stop, is loose and wobbly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Vale, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing slab on step, 2nd March
item.description:
A slab on one of the steps is missing. I didn’t notice in time and placed my foot on the edge of the existing slab, badly twisting my ankle. Given the poor lighting conditions in the area, I would strongly recommend addressing the problem so further injuries can be avoided. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Estate Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: "Landsdown Place" Road sign damaged/faded, on the junction of Belvedere Road, 2nd March
item.description:
The road sign for Landsdown Place, on the north end of this road, is faded/damaged. Could it be repaired/replaced, please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Lansdowne Place, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: One way arrow sign's light is out, on junction of Lansdown Place with Belvedere Road, 2nd March
item.description:
Light has a sticker depicting ID L775 on column SSL 6

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Lansdowne Place, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No entry sign's light is out, on the junction of Cintra Park with Anerley Hill, 2nd March
item.description:
Column number P401

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cintra Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
